validators.name: final ingress and rehearsal hardening pull-request workflow
isolated Codex CLI implementation review chain
validators.summary: Iterative whole-range and focused reviews resolved eight post-publication findings; the exact final public implementation review reported no actionable correctness issue.

validators.name: CodeRabbit final hardening pull-request status
validators.summary: The automated review completed successfully and reported no blocking issue. Independent validation remains the isolated Codex CLI review.

validators.name: immutable public closure candidate review
validators.summary: Protocol v2 requires a separate review of the exact candidate commit after this non-authoritative package is published to main.

themes: reachable and persistent Alloy runtime state

acceptance.criterion: one synthetic task has a connected command-to-publication trace
every terminal failure maps to one stable bounded class
secret fixtures and caller-controlled trace metadata do not enter exported signals
metrics and logs use bounded labels without canonical identifiers
telemetry failure cannot alter or roll back canonical state
alerts distinguish declared operational failure modes
